questions.question: Shah Nawaz Committee is related to ___________
options: Study effects of 1991 reforms on economy
questions.explanation: The three-member committee was formed by the Nehru-government to address the public demand to investigate the disappearance of Subhas Chandra Bose. The committee was led by Shah Nawaz Khan, and included Suresh Chandra Bose, brother of Subhas, and S. N. Maitra.

questions.question: Committee under whose chairmanship was mandated to examine social, economic and educational condition of the Muslim community of India?
questions.explanation: The Rajinder Sachar Committee was commissioned in 2005 by Indian Prime Minister Manmohan Singh to prepare a report on the latest social, economic, and educational conditions of the Muslim community of India. The committee was headed by former Chief Justice of the Delhi High Court Rajinder Sachar, as well as six other members.

questions.question: Committee on Gram Dak Sevas was headed by ___________?
questions.explanation: Government constituted Kamlesh Chandra Committee to study wage structure of Gramin Dak Sevaks.

questions.question: Whose committee suggested reforms in the structuring and governance of BCCI?
questions.explanation: The Lodha Committee has suggested sweeping reforms in the structuring and governance of BCCI. It also recommended separate governing bodies for the IPL and BCCI.

questions.question: Shyam Benegal Committee is related to ____________ industry?
questions.explanation: The Shyam Benegal committee was set up on January 1, 2016 to lay down rules and regulations for film certification taking note of best practices in various parts of the world and giving sufficient and adequate space for artistic and creative expression.

questions.question: Committee to study implementation of fast track bullet trains was chaired by ________?
questions.explanation: The Prime Minister's Office constituted a committee under Arvind Panagariya, vice-chairman of the NITI Aayog (2016), to hasten the Mumbai-Ahmedabad High-Speed Rail Corridor, meant for bullet trains between the two cities.

questions.question: Committee under whose chairmanship recommended changes in companies act 2013?
questions.explanation: Tapan Roy committee recommended changes in companies act 2013 to make convenience of doing business easy in India.

questions.question: Which among the following committee is related to New Education policy?
questions.explanation: The T.S.R. Subramanian committee was entrusted with preparing a new education policy for India.

questions.question: Akilesh Rajan Committee is related to ____________?
questions.explanation: The Committee on taxation of E-Commerce was chaired by Shri Akhilesh Ranjan. It was constituted on directions of CBDT, Ministry of Finance.

questions.question: Committee on government advertisements was constituted under __________?
questions.explanation: B B Tandon Committee was constituted to monitor government advertisements in accordance with Supreme Court directions.

questions.question: Ashok Lahiri committee is related to ___________ industry?
questions.explanation: The Central Government had set-up a Sub Committee under Dr. Ashok Lahiri, to interact with the trade and industry on the imposition of Central Excise Duty on jewellery.

questions.question: R M Lodha Panel is associated with __________?
options: Norms for arriving at repo rate
questions.explanation: The committee, headed by former chief justice R.M. Lodha, was appointed in 2016 to bring in transparency and accountability within the Medical Council of India (MCI) and oversee its statutory functioning.

questions.question: Committee to create a framework for taxi aggregators was chaired by __________?
questions.explanation: The Union Government constituted Sanjay Mitra committee to prepare a policy framework for app-based taxi aggregators and other transport operators.

questions.question: To monitor implementation of central schemes, the government has set up district-level committees called __________.
questions.explanation: To monitor implementation of central schemes, the government has set up district-level committees called DISHA which will be headed by sitting MPs of Lok Sabha. District Infrastructure Scheme Advisory (DISHA) Committee will be headed by sitting MPs of Lok Sabha with District Collector, Block Development Officers, Panchayat Representatives on its board.

questions.question: Which among the following committees was constituted to recommend on reducing fiscal deficit?
questions.explanation: The government had set up the Commission under former RBI Governor Bimal Jalan in August 2013 to suggest steps to reduce subsidies on food, fertiliser and oil and narrow the fiscal deficit.

questions.question: Committee under whose chairmanship was related to River Ganga?
questions.explanation: The Madhav Chitale committee was constituted in July 2016 by the Ministry of Water Resources River Development and Ganga Rejuvenation to prepare guidelines for desiltation of river Ganga.

questions.question: Committee under whose chairmanship recommended strengthen border protection?
questions.explanation: The Committee constituted under the Chairmanship of Shri Madhukar Gupta, recommended the Government to strengthen border protection and address vulnerabilities in fencing along the Indo-Pakistan border.

questions.question: Ayyapan Committee was constituted in relation to _________?
options: Salary hike to central government employees
Usage of pellet guns in Kashmir
questions.explanation: Committee constituted in 2015 under the chairmanship of Dr. S. Ayyappan, former Director General, Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) to ascertain the status of exploitation of marine fishery resources.

questions.question: Which committee was given the mandate to explore alternatives to pellet guns in Kashmir?
questions.explanation: TVSN Prasad committee was constituted to look into the alternatives to pellet guns.

questions.question: Committee on trade facilitation on pan-India basis was chaired by _______?
questions.explanation: Committee on Trade Facilitation (NCTF) to develop the pan-India road map for trade facilitation ws chaired by Pradeep Kumar Sinha.

questions.question: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) constituted a committee to study the regulatory issues relating to financial technology and digital banking under the chairmanship of ________?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India constituted Sudarshan Sen committee to study the regulatory issues relating to financial technology and digital banking.

questions.question: Deepak Naik chaired the committee to study rejuvenation of which river?
questions.explanation: Maharashtra government formed Deepak Naik committee to work towards reviving the river Godavari.

questions.question: Committee under whose chairmanship related to Cauvery river?
questions.explanation: The nine-member committee is headed by G.S. Jha was mandated to assess the cauvery basin and sharing the resources between Karnataka and Tamil Nadu.

questions.question: Judicial Committee on One Rank One Pension was led by ________?
questions.explanation: The Central Government had appointed the committee under the Chairmanship of Justice L Narasimha Reddy, retired Chief Justice of Patna High Court to look into the anomalies, if any, arising out of implementation of OROP.

questions.question: S S Mundra Committee is related to __________?
questions.explanation: RBI appointed Deputy Governor SS Mundra to oversee the recalibration of ATM machines after the government introduced new Rs 500 and Rs 2,000 notes.

questions.question: The 7th Central Pay commission was headed by __________?
questions.explanation: The 7th Pay Commission was headed by Justice AK Mathur. It recommended 14.27 per cent hike in basic pay.

questions.question: Digital Payment Committee was headed by ________?
questions.explanation: The committee on digital payments was led by former Finance Secretary Ratan P Watal. It reported that the drawbacks in the existing Payment and Settlement Systems Act of 2007 compel most of India to rely on cash transactions by restricting the reach of digital payments.

questions.question: The Central Sanctioning and Monitoring Committee for Swadesh Darshan scheme was chaired by ____________?
questions.explanation: The Central Sanctioning and Monitoring Committee (CSMC) chaired by Union Tourism Secretary Vinod Zutshi for the 'Swadesh Darshan Scheme'.

questions.question: N K Singh committee is related to _________?
questions.explanation: The FRBM Review Committee headed by former Revenue Secretary, NK Singh was appointed by the government to review the implementation of Fiscal Responsibility and Budgetary Management Act.

questions.question: Corporate Governance committee was headed by _________?
questions.explanation: SEBI had set up a committee under the Chairmanship of Uday Kotak, to help improve the standards of corporate governance of listed companies in India.
